posts.author: teresam (TeresaM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, you have a very useful widget called *“Item Description” listed as Beta.
Our team have found a very useful way of using this to help us break out our Scope, objective, Summary and Next Steps for each of our projects.

Will this feature become permanent? If so, when is it expected to become a permanent feature for Monday.com?

posts.author: Scarletioshub (Scarletioshub)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t have exact details on when the “Item Description” widget will become permanent in Monday. Features in Beta are tested based on user feedback before potential full release. To find out more, check Monday product updates, contact support, or visit their community forums. If the feature is popular and useful, it’s likely to be made permanent.
